zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Brugge於1355年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾馬森時，他的父親Baldwin De Brugge27歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Grandison19歲。他於大約1390年與Sybil在英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1408年4月7日在英國享年53歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾蕾托 馬爾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Brugge于1355年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾馬森时，他的父亲Baldwin De Brugge27岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Grandison19岁。他于大约1390年与Sybil在英国英格兰賀福爾維奧布利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1408年4月7日在英国享年53岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾蕾托 馬爾福。

nameMeanings.name: Brugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van der Brugge): topographic name for someone living near a brug ‘bridge’.
Flemish and Dutch: habitational name from Bruges.
North German (Brügge): variant of Bruck or a habitational name from any of several places called Brügge.

variants.name: Bruck
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Naftali, Eliahu, Hershel, Meyer, Ruvim, Shloime, Yoav.

German (also Brück): topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, or an occupational name for a bridge keeper or toll collector on a bridge, from Middle High German bruck(e) ‘bridge’. Bruck remained the Bavarian and Austrian form, reflected in placenames such as Innsbruck, whereas in central and northern Germany Brück(e) was the regular and ultimately standard form, as for example in the placename Osnabrück. Switzerland has both forms. See also Brueck .
Jewish (from Poland and Belarus): from Polish, Belorussian, or Yiddish bruk ‘pavement’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a paver.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Brugge was born in 1355, in Matson, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Baldwin De Brugge, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Elizabeth Grandison, was 19. He married Sybil about 1390, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 7 April 1408, in England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Little Malvern, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Brugge est né en 1355, à Matson, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Baldwin De Brugge, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Grandison, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Sybil environ 1390, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1408, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Little Malvern, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

Er hat um 1390 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sybil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 7. Lui sposato Sybil circa 1390, nel Weobley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 7 aprile 1408, nel England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Little Malvern, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bruggeが1355年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアマトソンで生まれた時，父Baldwin De Bruggeは27歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Grandisonは19歳であった。約1390年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーでSybilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1408年4月7日にイギリスで53歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアリットル マルバーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Brugge(이)가 1355년 영국 그루스스터실르 마츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baldwin De Brugge(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Grandison(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 Sybil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1408년 4월 7일 영국에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 리틀 맬버에 묻혔다.

pt.Bridge Sollars, Herefordshire, England: Bridge Sollers, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Brugge nasceu em 1355, em Matson, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baldwin De Brugge, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Grandison, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil aproximadamente 1390, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1408, em Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Little Malvern, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Bridge Sollars, Herefordshire, England: Bridge Sollers, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Brugge родился в 1355 г. в местности мацон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baldwin De Brugge было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Grandison, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil около 1390 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 7 апреля 1408 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности литл малвирн, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Brugge nació en 1355, en Matson, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baldwin De Brugge, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel Elizabeth Grandison, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sybil aproximadamente 1390, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 7 de abril de 1408, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Little Malvern, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
